title: Ey Sandakaara Lyrics Irudhi Suttru Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Ey Sandakaara Song Lyrics from Irudhi Suttru
Singer: Dhee
Lyricist: Vivek
Music Director: Santhosh Narayanan

naan enna
ezhudi neetta
adhil vetkam
mattum kilichi potta.

en aasa romba paavam
konjam kanneduthu paaru
nee mosa paarva veesi
madhikettu thiriyum
madhiya paaru

ey sandakaara
gundu muliyula
rendu uyira
thaedi paayudhu

thanima thoraththa
alayuraen naanum
manasa thorandhu
ena kaappaathu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ey Sandakaara'?

The song 'Ey Sandakaara' conveys a sense of joy and celebration, encouraging listeners to embrace life with energy and enthusiasm.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Irudhi Suttru'?

This song is featured in a lively context within Irudhi Suttru, highlighting moments of excitement and dance that resonate with the film's themes.

Who is the singer of 'Ey Sandakaara'?

The song is sung by Dhee, known for his unique voice and energetic performances.

Who composed the music for 'Ey Sandakaara'?

The music for this song was composed by Santhosh Narayanan, who is celebrated for his innovative sound in Tamil cinema.

When was 'Ey Sandakaara' released?

'Ey Sandakaara' was released on January 7, 2016, as part of the Irudhi Suttru soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ey Sandakaara', the protagonist celebrates life with infectious energy and enthusiasm, perfectly encapsulating the vibrant spirit of youth. The song's upbeat tempo and lively lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect anthem for parties and celebrations. Set against the backdrop of Irudhi Suttru, it highlights moments of dance and camaraderie among characters. Overall, the song conveys a message of embracing life and enjoying every moment.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ey Sandakaara from Irudhi Suttru is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the spirit of celebration and energy. With Dhee's captivating vocals and Santhosh Narayanan's infectious beats, this song is sure to get you moving. Experience the lively vibe and catchy lyrics that make this track a must-listen!
stanzaMeanings: Hey Sandakaara, searching for two lives in the round ball.
It's enough to dance with this fight.
I want you to go away with my precious fight.
I will not let my loneliness show, I will protect my heart.
I will search, I will struggle, I will tie the knot, yes.
I will search, I will struggle, I will tie the knot, yes.
I will get rid of the troubles, I will half-bake the issues, I will put the sinner aside, yes.
You came like a beautiful obstacle, I ran and walked with you.
What is the beginning? I have become a place, if I break, I have fallen into you.
When will you tie the knot that you have sown?
What should I write? If I write, only the shame will be left.
I will search, I will struggle, I will tie the knot, yes.
I will get rid of the troubles, I will half-bake the issues, I will put the sinner aside, yes.
In a small dress, with a heart, a love is blooming.
When I see you, does my life blend with you?
My desire is very sad, just look a little, you are blowing away the lies, look at the mind that is spinning.
I will search, I will struggle, I will tie the knot, yes.
I will get rid of the troubles, I will half-bake the issues, I will put the sinner aside, yes.
Hey Sandakaara, searching for two lives in the round ball, I will not let my loneliness show, I will protect my heart.
I will search, I will struggle, I will tie the knot, yes.
I will get rid of the troubles, I will half-bake the issues, I will put the sinner aside, yes.
